title: selaginella angustifolia
intro: Selaginella angustifolia, also known as spikemoss or needle spikemoss, is a type of evergreen fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Selaginella angustifolia include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Selaginella angustifolia can be prepared as tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
